feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: Misty reported a burglary near Cerulean's east side: Rocket stole a technical machine and left boot prints toward the south road.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red found Rocket notes tying the stolen TM to black-market transport routes and Bill's unusual storage-network readings.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Stolen TM recovered from the Rocket thief. Cerulean's local crisis is contained for now.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill marked the south road open. Route 5 and Vermilion are the next leads for Rocket's shipping network.
